case_title: CASSANDRA REED VS. GEORGE MICHAEL TAYLOR

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF REED, CASSANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, GEORGE MICHAEL , AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
